parameters.content:
## WORKFLOW 1: exprs-prospect-ingest

**TRIGGER:** Webhook POST or Manual CSV upload
**COST:** ~3 LeadMagic credits per prospect (Company + Email + Funding)

### FLOW
Webhook/CSV → Validate → Batch (1/sec) →
  ├─ LeadMagic Company Search  (`/v1/companies/company-search`)
  ├─ LeadMagic Email Finder    (`/v1/people/email-finder`)
  └─ LeadMagic Funding         (`/v1/companies/company-funding`)
→ Merge → Classify B2B/B2C → Qualify (ICP filter) →
  ├─ ✅ Qualified (20–200 emp, B2B) → Supabase
  └─ ❌ Disqualified → Supabase (for analytics)

### ICP RULES
- ✅ **Must-have:** 20–200 employees AND B2B/B2B2C
- ❌ Too small: < 20 employees
- ❌ Too large: > 200 employees
- ❌ Wrong type: B2C only
- 🔍 Review: employee count unknown

### ENV VARS
`LEADMAGIC_API_KEY`

### SWAP TO AI ARK
Replace 3 LeadMagic nodes with:
- `POST api.ai-ark.com/.../v1/companies` (X-TOKEN header)
- `POST api.ai-ark.com/.../v1/people` (X-TOKEN header)
Update field mappings in "Merge Enrichment" node
